positive: A whimsical, stylized forest creature silhouette, designed for high-contrast print art. The creature, which combines elements of a fox, a squirrel, and a crescent moon, is posed dynamically against a deep indigo, starry night background. The main subject must have clean, sharp edges and a strong, recognizable silhouette. Use a flat graphic design style with vibrant, complementary colors like burnt orange, emerald green, and sapphire blue. The composition should be centrally placed, allowing for scalable cropping on apparel. Studio quality, vector graphic look, maximum contrast, perfect symmetry, detailed patterning within the silhouette, magical realism, kawaii style, printable artwork, isolated subject on colored background.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, poorly rendered, artifact, noise, grainy, sketch, photography, muted, grayscale, gradient, semi-realistic, 3d render
